title: About Marelune Bali
description: Meet Marelune Bali, a private yacht agency focused on refined ocean journeys around Bali.
hero_subtitle: We turn Bali sea days into private, well-composed journeys with local route knowledge and premium service standards.
story_title: Built for guests who want calm luxury
story_body: Marelune Bali exists for travelers who want the ocean experience to feel handled, beautiful, and personal. The focus is simple: clear options, fast confirmation, refined presentation, and routes that make sense for Bali's real conditions.
team_title: People behind your perfect sea day

team.name: Raka Aditya
team.bio: Local route expert with deep knowledge of Bali's waters.

team.name: Maya Prameswari
team.bio: Ensures every guest feels attended to from first inquiry to return.

team.name: Dewa Mahendra
team.bio: Coordinates logistics and timing for smooth sailing experiences.

values.title: Local Knowledge
values.text: Deep understanding of Bali's routes, tides, and hidden gems.

values.title: Premium Service
values.text: Every detail handled with care and professional standards.

values.title: Clear Communication
values.text: Honest timelines, transparent pricing, and responsive updates.

values.title: Flexible Planning
values.text: Routes adapt to weather, preferences, and sea conditions.

faq_title: People ask before they request a private yacht
faq_body: Quick answers to help you prepare for your sea day.

faq.question: How do I book?
faq.answer: Choose a preferred route or package, submit the booking form, and the team will confirm availability by WhatsApp.

faq.question: Can the trip be customized?
faq.answer: Yes. Date, route, guest count, celebration setup, and yacht tier can be adjusted after the first request.

faq.question: What should I prepare?
faq.answer: Prepare your desired date, number of guests, preferred departure area, and occasion details if the trip is for a celebration.

faq.question: Is payment handled on the website?
faq.answer: Not yet. The website captures leads and routes the request to the team for manual confirmation and payment instructions.

cta_title: Let us plan your perfect sea day
cta_body: Tell us your vision and we'll make it happen.
